# Ivan Kornienko - Cloud Solutions Architect & DevSecOps Consultant

> Senior Cloud Infrastructure Contractor delivering scalable, secure cloud platforms, Kubernetes GitOps, MLOps, and cost optimization.

## Core Capabilities
- Cloud Architecture (GCP, AWS, Azure)
- Kubernetes Orchestration & GitOps (ArgoCD)
- MLOps & AI Reliability
- Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, OpenTofu)
